title: Hour clock 24
description: Let the day and night change also be 24 hours
body:
HourClock24:

HourClock24 is a mod designed to synchronize Minecraft's day-night cycle with the real world. By accurately simulating Earth's rotation, it offers a more realistic gaming experience. Whether it's the longest day of the summer solstice or the shortest day of the winter solstice, HourClock24 automatically adjusts the game's day and night durations to match the player's local conditions.

What can it do?

- Automatically adjusts in-game sunrise and sunset times based on the real-world date.
- Supports a 24-hour mode, which players can enable or disable with the commands /hourclock true and /hourclock false.
- Allows players to customize sunrise time with the command /hourclock dawntime <time>.
- Inspired by a sudden brainstorm.
